case_title: VONNAH P BAGNER VS. ACORN ASSOCIATES, INC., AN ARKANSAS CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAGNER, VONNAH P AS TO DEFENDANT ACORN ASSOCIATES, INC., AN ARKANSAS CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
